debug_info.goal:
α✝ : Type u_1
inst✝⁴ : MeasurableSpace α✝
H : Type u_2
inst✝³ : NormedAddCommGroup H
inst✝² : InnerProductSpace ℂ H
inst✝¹ : CompleteSpace H
α : Type u_3
inst✝ : MeasurableSpace α
E : @ResolutionOfIdentity α inst✝ H inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹
x : H
w₁ w₂ : Set α
h : w₁ ⊆ w₂
⊢ ‖(@ResolutionOfIdentity.measureOf' α inst✝ H inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ E w₁) x‖ ≤
    ‖(@ResolutionOfIdentity.measureOf' α inst✝ H inst✝³ inst✝² inst✝¹ E w₂) x‖

      _ ≤ 1 * ‖E.measureOf' w₂ x‖ := by

          have h₁ : (E.measureOf' w₁) ^ 2 = E.measureOf' w₁ := hp.1

      rw [← E.m_Inter' (MeasurableSet.of_not_not (by intro h'; exact h' h)) (MeasurableSet.of_not_not (by tauto))]

have hw₁ : MeasurableSet w₁ → ‖E.measureOf' w₁ x‖ ≤ ‖E.measureOf' w₂ x‖ := by
      intro hw₁
      have hw₂ : MeasurableSet w₂ := MeasurableSet.of_subset hw₁ h
      have hdiff : MeasurableSet (w₂ \ w₁) := MeasurableSet.diff hw₂ hw₁
      have hdisj : Disjoint w₁ (w₂ \ w₁) := Disjoint.diff_right
      have hunion : w₂ = w₁ ∪ (w₂ \ w₁) := Set.union_diff_cancel' h
      rw [hunion]
      have hadd : E.measureOf' w₂ = E.measureOf' w₁ + E.measureOf' (w₂ \ w₁) :=
        E.m_Union' hw₁ hdiff hdisj
      rw [hadd]
      exact (norm_add_le _ _).trans (by simp [le_add_iff_nonneg_left, norm_nonneg])
    have hmeas₁ : MeasurableSet w₁ ∨ ¬MeasurableSet w₁ := Classical.em (MeasurableSet w₁)
    have hmeas₂ : MeasurableSet w₂ ∨ ¬MeasurableSet w₂ := Classical.em (MeasurableSet w₂)
    cases' hmeas₂ with hw₂ hnw₂
    · cases' hmeas₁ with hw₁ hnw₁
      · exact hw₁ hw₁
      · rw [E.not_measurable' hnw₁]
        simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.zero_apply, norm_zero, zero_le]
    · rw [E.not_measurable' hnw₂]
      simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.zero_apply, norm_zero, zero_le]

        _ ≤ 1 * ‖E.measureOf' w₂ y‖ := by

      rw [Set.union_diff_cancel h]
    have h₃ : MeasurableSet w₁ → MeasurableSet w₂ →
        E.measureOf' w₂ = E.measureOf' w₁ + E.measureOf' (w₂ \ w₁) := by
      intro hw₁ hw₂
      apply E.m_Union'
      · exact hw₁
      · exact hw₂.diff hw₁
      · exact Set.disjoint_diff
    have h₄ : ∀ w, IsOrthogonalProjection (E.measureOf' w) := E.isOrthogonalProjection'
    have h₅ : ∀ w, (E.measureOf' w).adjoint = E.measureOf' w := fun w ↦ (h₄ w).2
    have h₆ : ∀ w, (E.measureOf' w) ^ 2 = E.measureOf' w := fun w ↦ (h₄ w).1
    calc
      ‖E.measureOf' w₁ x‖
        = ‖E.measureOf' w₁ (E.measureOf' w₂ x)‖ := by
          rw [← h₂]
          rw [h₃ (by sorry) (by sorry)]
          -- Instead, use that E.measureOf' w₁ ≤ E.measureOf' w₂ as projections
          sorry
      _ ≤ ‖E.measureOf' w₂ x‖ := by
          apply op_norm_le_bound
          · exact (E.measureOf' w₁).opNorm_nonneg
          · intro y
            have : ‖E.measureOf' w₁ y‖ ≤ ‖y‖ := by
              apply (E.measureOf' w₁).opNorm_le_iff.mpr
              simp [h₄ w₁]
            sorry

have hw₁ : MeasurableSet w₁ → MeasurableSet w₂ → ‖E.measureOf' w₁ x‖ ≤ ‖E.measureOf' w₂ x‖ := by
      intro hw₁ hw₂
      have hdiff : w₂ = w₁ ∪ (w₂ \ w₁) := by ext; simp [h]
      rw [hdiff]
      have hdisj : Disjoint w₁ (w₂ \ w₁) := by
        apply Set.disjoint_left.mpr
        intro a ha hb
        exact hb.2 ha
      rw [E.m_Union' hw₁ (Set.measurableSet_diff hw₂ hw₁) hdisj]
      calc
        ‖(E.measureOf' w₁ + E.measureOf' (w₂ \ w₁)) x‖
          = ‖E.measureOf' w₁ x + E.measureOf' (w₂ \ w₁) x‖ := by simp [add_apply]
        _ ≥ ‖E.measureOf' w₁ x‖ := by
          apply norm_add_le_norm_sub_norm _ _
          nlinarith [norm_nonneg (E.measureOf' (w₂ \ w₁) x)]
    by_cases hw₁ : MeasurableSet w₁ <;> by_cases hw₂ : MeasurableSet w₂ <;>
      simp_all [E.not_measurable', ContinuousLinearMap.zero_apply, norm_zero]

have hw₁ : MeasurableSet w₁ → ‖E.measureOf' w₁ x‖ ≤ ‖E.measureOf' w₂ x‖ := by
      intro hw₁
      have hw₂ : MeasurableSet w₂ := MeasurableSet.mono h hw₁
      have : E.measureOf' w₁ = E.measureOf' w₁ * E.measureOf' w₂ := by
        rw [← E.m_Inter' hw₁ hw₂]
        congr
        ext
        aesop
      rw [this]
      calc
        ‖E.measureOf' w₁ x‖ = ‖E.measureOf' w₁ (E.measureOf' w₂ x)‖ := by rw [← this]
        _ ≤ ‖E.measureOf' w₁‖ * ‖E.measureOf' w₂ x‖ := by apply ContinuousLinearMap.le_op_norm
        _ ≤ 1 * ‖E.measureOf' w₂ x‖ := by
          have : ‖E.measureOf' w₁‖ ≤ 1 := by
            have : IsOrthogonalProjection (E.measureOf' w₁) := E.isOrthogonalProjection' w₁
            exact op_norm_of_orthogonal_projection this
          linarith
        _ = ‖E.measureOf' w₂ x‖ := by simp
    have : ¬MeasurableSet w₁ → ‖E.measureOf' w₁ x‖ ≤ ‖E.measureOf' w₂ x‖ := by
      intro h₁
      rw [E.not_measurable' h₁]
      simp only [ContinuousLinearMap.zero_apply, norm_zero]
      exact norm_nonneg _
    by_cases h₁ : MeasurableSet w₁ <;> simp_all

have : E.measureOf' w₁ = E.measureOf' w₁ * E.measureOf' w₂ := by
      rw [← E.m_Inter' (MeasurableSet.of_empty.subset h), Set.inter_eq_left.mpr h]
    rw [this]
    exact op_norm_mul_le _ _ _

have h₁ : E.measureOf' w₁ = E.measureOf' w₁ * E.measureOf' w₂ := by
      rw [← E.m_Inter' (by aesop) (by aesop)]
      congr
      ext
      aesop
    rw [h₁]
    exact op_norm_le_bound _ (by norm_num) fun y => by
      calc
        ‖(E.measureOf' w₁ * E.measureOf' w₂) y‖
          = ‖E.measureOf' w₁ (E.measureOf' w₂ y)‖ := rfl
        _ ≤ ‖E.measureOf' w₁‖ * ‖E.measureOf' w₂ y‖ := by apply op_norm_mul_le
        _ ≤ 1 * ‖E.measureOf' w₂ y‖ := by
          have : ‖E.measureOf' w₁‖ ≤ 1 := by
            have : IsStarProjection (E.measureOf' w₁) := E.isOrthogonalProjection' w₁
            exact op_norm_of_isStarProjection this
          linarith
        _ = ‖E.measureOf' w₂ y‖ := by simp

have h₁ : E.measureOf' w₁ = E.measureOf' w₁ * E.measureOf' w₂ := by
      rw [← E.m_Inter' (by aesop) (by aesop)]
      congr
      ext
      aesop
    rw [h₁]
    exact op_norm_mul_le _ _

have : E.measureOf' w₁ = E.measureOf' w₁ * E.measureOf' w₂ := by
      rw [← E.m_Inter' (MeasurableSet.comap (fun _ => True) (Set.mem_univ w₁)) (MeasurableSet.comap (fun _ => True) (Set.mem_univ w₂))]
      congr
      ext
      simp [h]
    rw [this]
    exact op_norm_le_bound _ (op_norm_bound _ (by simpa using E.isOrthogonalProjection' w₂)) (by simpa using E.isOrthogonalProjection' w₁)
